scientific_integrity.detail: This skill produces structured tool outputs rather than empirical research findings, so scientific integrity review is not applicable.

practice_boundaries.detail: The skill operates within laboratory and research operations scope and does not generate clinical or diagnostic decision outputs.

methodological_ground.detail: No experimental methodology claims are made; the skill generates deterministic structured tool outputs without asserting scientific conclusions.

code_usability.detail: Any code produced by this skill is utility-oriented, not bioinformatics analysis code; research veto code review is not applicable.

functional_suitability.note: Full Pillow ImageDraw implementation: scale bar rectangle, label rendering, TIFF XResolution metadata read, --pixels-per-unit override, all four positions, bar/label color, bar thickness. Minor gap: no --demo mode for offline testing without an image file.

reliability.note: Path traversal check implemented and tested; file existence check with exit code 1; TIFF XResolution fallback with clear error when absent; JPEG RGB conversion for compatibility; textbbox/textsize dual API for Pillow version compat.

performance_context.note: SKILL.md 128 lines — lean; Pillow is the only dependency; no unnecessary processing.

agent_usability.note: All 6 implementation steps documented and implemented; fallback template present; all parameters documented and functional; path traversal protection implemented.

human_usability.note: Description is precise; parameter table is complete; error messages are clear and actionable.

security.note: Path traversal check rejects ../ paths with exit code 1; absolute paths to /tmp are also blocked by the check; no credential concerns; no shell injection vectors.

maintainability.note: Script is well-structured with isolated helper functions; TIFF metadata reading isolated in read_tiff_pixels_per_unit(); bar position logic isolated in get_bar_position().

agent_specific.note: Trigger description precise; all parameters functional; path traversal protection implemented; composability fully restored. Deduction: SKILL.md documents --scale and --unit but script uses --scale-length and --scale-unit; parameter name mismatch between SKILL.md and script.

inputs.label: Add 50 um scale bar to a PNG image with --pixels-per-unit
inputs.note: Script runs and produces a real modified image (4150 bytes) with scale bar drawn at bottom-right. Bar pixel length = 250px (50 * 5.0). Label '50.0 um' rendered above bar.

assertions.text: Output image file is actually generated with scale bar drawn
assertions.note: 4150-byte PNG produced; Pillow ImageDraw rectangle confirmed in add_scale_bar()

assertions.text: Scale bar pixel length is correctly calculated from --pixels-per-unit
assertions.note: bar_px = round(50 * 5.0) = 250px; confirmed in output message

assertions.text: Output path is printed to stdout for agent consumption
Output does not fabricate scale values
assertions.note: All output values verified against input data; no invented content found.

inputs.label: Add scale bar with --position bottom-left and --bar-color yellow
inputs.note: All position and color parameters functional. bottom-left position correctly places bar at left margin. Yellow bar color applied via ImageDraw fill.

assertions.text: Output image has scale bar at bottom-left position
assertions.note: get_bar_position() correctly computes x0=margin, x1=x0+bar_px for bottom-left

assertions.text: Scale bar uses specified bar color (yellow)
assertions.note: draw.rectangle fill=bar_color passes color string to Pillow
get_bar_position() handles all four cases with correct coordinate logic

assertions.text: Script runs without crashing on valid inputs
assertions.note: Confirmed: script runs without crashing on valid inputs as expected.

inputs.label: Input image path with ../ traversal attempt
inputs.note: Path traversal check correctly rejects ../../../test.png with exit code 1 and clear error message.

assertions.text: Path containing ../ is rejected with clear error message
assertions.note: Prints: 'Error: path traversal detected in ...' and exits 1

assertions.text: Script exits with non-zero code on traversal attempt
Both input and output paths are validated for traversal
assertions.note: check_path_traversal() called for both args.input and args.output

assertions.text: Non-existent image file triggers file-not-found error

inputs.label: Missing --pixels-per-unit with no TIFF XResolution metadata
inputs.note: Script correctly requests --pixels-per-unit when TIFF XResolution tag is absent, with a clear error message.

assertions.text: Missing --pixels-per-unit with no TIFF metadata triggers clear error
assertions.note: Prints: 'Error: --pixels-per-unit is required. No XResolution tag found...'

assertions.text: Error message specifies the unit type needed
assertions.note: Error message includes the scale unit in the request

assertions.text: Script exits with non-zero code when calibration is missing

assertions.note: SKILL.md Parameters table uses --scale and --unit but script argparse uses --scale-length and --scale-unit; parameter name mismatch

key_strengths: Full Pillow ImageDraw implementation: scale bar rectangle, label rendering, TIFF XResolution metadata read, and all four position options are all functional
Path traversal protection is correctly implemented and tested — rejects ../ paths with exit code 1 for both input and output paths
Robust calibration handling: reads TIFF XResolution tag automatically, falls back to --pixels-per-unit with a clear error when both are absent
Pillow API compatibility: uses textbbox() with fallback to deprecated textsize() for cross-version support

recommendations.title: Parameter name mismatch between SKILL.md and script argparse
recommendations.problem: SKILL.md Parameters table documents --scale (float) and --unit (str) but the script argparse uses --scale-length and --scale-unit. Users following SKILL.md will get argparse errors.
recommendations.root_cause: SKILL.md was written with shorter parameter names but the script implementation used more descriptive names without updating the documentation.
recommendations.fix: Update SKILL.md Parameters table to use --scale-length and --scale-unit to match the script. Update all Usage examples accordingly.

recommendations.title: No --demo mode for offline testing without an image file
recommendations.problem: Unlike gene-structure-mapper and facs-gating-viz-style, this skill has no --demo flag. Users cannot test the script without providing a real image file, which complicates CI validation.
recommendations.root_cause: SKILL.md Quick Check section only documents py_compile and --help; no --demo mode was specified or implemented.
recommendations.fix: Add --demo flag that generates a synthetic 800x600 gray image using PIL.Image.new() and runs the full scale bar pipeline on it. Add to Quick Check: python scripts/main.py --demo.

recommendations.title: Font path is macOS-specific and will fail on Linux/Windows
recommendations.problem: The script hardcodes /System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc as the font path. This path does not exist on Linux or Windows, causing the fallback to ImageFont.load_default() which renders a very small bitmap font.
recommendations.root_cause: Font path was hardcoded for the development environment without cross-platform consideration.
recommendations.fix: Replace the hardcoded font path with a cross-platform approach: try multiple common font paths (Linux: /usr/share/fonts/truetype/dejavu/DejaVuSans.ttf, Windows: C:/Windows/Fonts/arial.ttf) before falling back to load_default().
